subtitles.original: 綺麗な勝ち方は
subtitles.english: A beautiful way to win

subtitles.original: 望むべくもない
subtitles.english: is not even worth wishing for.

subtitles.original: 華やかさも必要ない
subtitles.english: Nor is glamour necessary,

subtitles.original: それが私だから
subtitles.english: because that's who I am.

subtitles.original: 歴史はいつだって
subtitles.english: History is always

subtitles.original: 勝者が作るモノ
subtitles.english: written by the victors,

subtitles.original: だけど記憶はその限りじゃない
subtitles.english: but memories are not limited to that.

subtitles.original: 今この時だけは
subtitles.english: Only at this very moment,

subtitles.original: 決断的な刹那性に飛び込んでいけ保存
subtitles.english: dive into this decisive, fleeting moment!

subtitles.original: 灰色の地で描く 私の想いが
subtitles.english: My feelings, painted on this grey land...

subtitles.original: 美しき痛みをも 乗り越えて書き換えていく
subtitles.english: ...will overcome and rewrite even the beautiful pain.

subtitles.original: 後悔は1ミリもない
subtitles.english: There is not a single millimeter of regret.

subtitles.original: あるのは灼熱だけ
subtitles.english: All that exists is burning passion.

subtitles.original: ただ自分の生命を蹴り上げるように
subtitles.english: Just to kick up my own life...

subtitles.original: 始まりは些細 最早どうだっていい
subtitles.english: The beginning was trivial; it doesn't matter anymore.

subtitles.original: 突き動かされ指先を伸ばす
subtitles.english: Driven by impulse, I reach out my fingertips.

subtitles.original: 現実は残酷だと 気付いていないわけじゃない
subtitles.english: It's not that I don't realize reality is cruel.

subtitles.original: 諦めるその時は 今ではなかったらしい保存
subtitles.english: The time to give up was apparently not now.

subtitles.original: 灰色の空描く もう一度点火して
subtitles.english: Painting the grey sky, let's ignite it once more.

subtitles.original: ただ自分の生命を証明しよう
subtitles.english: Let's simply prove my own life,

subtitles.original: そこにいた事を刻むように
subtitles.english: as if engraving the fact that I was there.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで
subtitles.english: Yes! And with that...

subtitles.original: 新曲「灰色の証明」
subtitles.english: ...my new song, "Proof of Grey"...

subtitles.original: やっと披露できた！やっと証明できた！
subtitles.english: ...I finally got to perform it! I finally proved it!

subtitles.original: 聴いてくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for listening!

subtitles.original: この楽曲は岸田教団＆THE明星ロケッツの皆さんに製作していただきまして
subtitles.english: This song was created for me by Kishida Kyoudan & THE Akeboshi Rockets,

subtitles.original: スポーツだったり、みんなが頑張りたい時に力になれるような応援ソングを作りたいと思い
subtitles.english: with the hope of creating a cheering song that can give strength to everyone during sports or when they want to do their best.

subtitles.original: 色々語ったらかなり熱くてカッコいい楽曲に仕上がりました！
subtitles.english: After discussing various ideas, it turned out to be a very passionate and cool song!

subtitles.original: 上手くいかないことがあっても、また立ち上がって前に進む
subtitles.english: Even when things don't go well, standing up again and moving forward...

subtitles.original: わためにとっても背中を押してくれるそんな特別な楽曲に、今回のライブでなりました！
subtitles.english: ...through this live show, it has become such a special song that pushes even my back!

subtitles.original: みんなにとってもそうだったら嬉しいです
subtitles.english: I hope it is the same for all of you!

subtitles.original: こちらの新曲MVいっぱい見て、楽曲もぜひ購入して、わための音楽を応援していただけたらとっても嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: Please watch the MV for this new song a lot, purchase the song, and support Watame's music—I'd be so happy!

subtitles.original: 目指せ武道館！
subtitles.english: Aiming for Budokan!

subtitles.original: と、あ、ここで、まだ告知していないものが一つありまして
subtitles.english: And, ah, here, there's one more announcement that I haven't made yet.

subtitles.original: ライブじゃないんですけど
subtitles.english: It's not about a live concert, but...

subtitles.original: なんと！
subtitles.english: ...surprisingly!

subtitles.original: じゃーん！
subtitles.english: Ta-da!

subtitles.original: 「角巻わための Have a nice day」書籍刊行が決定！
subtitles.english: A book publication of "Tsunomaki Watame's Have a nice day" has been confirmed!

subtitles.original: ということで、ハバナイが本になります！
subtitles.english: In other words, "Habanai" is becoming a book!

subtitles.original: 出版社は、かいけつゾロリやおしりたんていなどで有名なポプラ社様より、オリジナルグッズ付きで12月に刊行予定です！
subtitles.english: It is scheduled to be published in December with original merchandise by Poplar Publishing, famous for "Kaiketsu Zorori" and "Oshiri Tantei"!

subtitles.original: まだ少し先にはなりますが、楽しみに待っててもらえると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: It's still a little while away, but I'd be happy if you look forward to it!

subtitles.original: そして！じゃーん！
subtitles.english: And! Ta-da!

subtitles.original: 今年も角巻わため誕生日記念グッズが受注受付中です！
subtitles.english: This year as well, Tsunomaki Watame's Birthday Memorial Merchandise is available for pre-order!

subtitles.original: ラインナップを改めて紹介させてください！
subtitles.english: Let me introduce the lineup once again!

subtitles.original: どどどどん！
subtitles.english: Dodododon!

subtitles.original: でたー！ふーみママ描き下ろしの、わためのあったかブランケット！
subtitles.english: Here it is! Watame's warm blanket illustrated by Fuumi-mama!

subtitles.original: なんと、セクシーです！
subtitles.english: It is, surprisingly, sexy!

subtitles.original: そして、裏面にはわためいとがいます！
subtitles.english: And, Watamates are on the back!

subtitles.original: 丸めるとね、わためいとの形になりますので、2wayでも使えます！
subtitles.english: If you roll it up, it takes the shape of a Watamate, so it can be used in two ways!

subtitles.original: ぜひ、温もりを感じてください！
subtitles.english: Please feel its warmth!

subtitles.original: そして、どどどどん！
subtitles.english: And, dodododon!

subtitles.original: わため＆わためいと温感マグカップ！
subtitles.english: Watame & Watamate Thermal Mug!

subtitles.original: こちらは、もた先生に描き下ろしていただきまして
subtitles.english: This was illustrated by Mota-sensei,

subtitles.original: 最初は夜の風景なんですけど、温かいものを入れていただくとその熱を感知して
subtitles.english: and while it starts as a night scene, when you put a hot drink in, it detects the heat...

subtitles.original: 朝の景色に柄が変わるような仕様になっております！
subtitles.english: ...and the design changes to a morning scene!

subtitles.original: わための配信を意識してデザインしてもらったので
subtitles.english: It was designed with Watame's streams in mind,

subtitles.original: 配信を見ながらぜひ、温かい飲み物を飲んでくださいね！
subtitles.english: so please enjoy a hot drink while watching the streams!

subtitles.original: そして、まだあります！どどどどどどどん！
subtitles.english: And, there's more! Dododododododon!

subtitles.original: わためいとクッション！
subtitles.english: Watamate Cushion!

subtitles.original: クッションとして使うもよし、飾るもよし、とっても可愛いクッションなので、ぜひお部屋に
subtitles.english: You can use it as a cushion, or display it—it's a very cute cushion, so please have it in your room!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Transcription and Summary for "灰色の証明" (Proof of Grey)**

Alright, here's what I've got. I need subtitles for this video, from the very beginning to 04:58. I've broken it down into two parts: the performance of "灰色の証明" (Proof of Grey), and Watame's speech. Time to get this done. Let's transcribe this.

**"灰色の証明" Performance Transcript:**

*   **00:00.000 - 00:02.100**: 綺麗な勝ち方は (Kirei na kachikata wa / A beautiful way to win)
*   **00:02.100 - 00:04.200**: 望むべくもない (Nozomu beku mo nai / Is not even worth wishing for)
*   **00:04.200 - 00:06.800**: 華やかさも必要ない (Hanayakasa mo hitsuyou nai / Nor is glamour necessary)
*   **00:06.800 - 00:09.100**: それが私だから (Sore ga watashi dakara / Because that's who I am)
*   **00:09.100 - 00:11.200**: 歴史はいつだって (Rekishi wa itsudatte / History is always)
*   **00:11.200 - 00:13.400**: 勝者が作るモノ (Shousha ga tsukuru mono / Made by the victors)
*   **00:13.400 - 00:17.400**: だけど記憶はその限りじゃない (Dakedo kioku wa sono kagiri ja nai / But memories are not limited to that)
*   **00:17.400 - 00:21.100**: 今この時だけは (Ima kono toki dake wa / Only at this very moment)
*   **00:21.100 - 00:26.500**: 決断的な刹那性に飛び込んでいけ (Ketsudanteki na setsunasei ni tobikonde ike / Dive into this decisive, fleeting moment!)
*   **00:26.500 - 00:30.200**: 灰色の地で描く 私の想いが (Haiiro no chi de egaku watashi no omoi ga / Painted on this grey land, my feelings...)
*   **00:30.200 - 00:35.700**: 美しき痛みをも 乗り越えて書き換えていく (Utsukushiki itami wo mo norikoete kakikaete iku / ...will overcome and rewrite even the beautiful pain)
*   **00:35.700 - 00:37.700**: 後悔は１ミリもない (Koukai wa ichi-miri mo nai / There is not a single millimeter of regret)
*   **00:37.700 - 00:40.400**: あるのは灼熱だけ (Aru no wa shakunetsu dake / All that exists is burning passion)
*   **00:40.400 - 00:45.300**: ただ自分の生命を蹴り上げるように (Tada jibun no seimei wo keriageru you ni / Just to kick up my own life)
*   **00:45.300 - 00:50.000**: 始まりは些細 最早どうだっていい (Hajimari wa sasai mohaya dou datte ii / The beginning was trivial, it doesn't matter anymore)
*   **00:50.000 - 00:54.000**: 突き動かされ指先を伸ばす (Tsukiugokasare yubisaki wo nobasu / Driven by impulse, I reach out my fingertips)
*   **00:54.000 - 01:04.000**: *\[Instrumental]*
*   **01:04.000 - 01:08.700**: 現実は残酷だと 気付いていないわけじゃない (Genjitsu wa zankoku da to kizuite inai wake ja nai / It's not that
